Name: KNOWLEDGE_LOADSCREEN_ITEM_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines appearance of loading screens and the tips they show.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Appearance Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID that causes this loading screen to appear. -1 means it will always appear. Removal flag will override this.

Fields.Name: Removal Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID that causes this loading screen to disappear. -1 means it will never appear.

Fields.Name: Hint Text ID
Fields.Description: The FMG ID to use for the displayed hint text (both title and description. -1 means none.
